shorts.title: Fire department builds new training center
shorts.title_distilled: Fire department builds new training center.
shorts.description: OLD FORGE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A local fire department saw a fresh upgrade made out of something old and used. Shipping containers called Conex boxes were being transformed into a new training center for firefighters. 28/22 News Reporter Colby Hughes stopped by the fire department to explain how this will help keep firefighters' skills [...]

shorts.title: Jumping into summertime in Scranton
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Some exciting news for kids and families in and around the Scranton area: the city's public pools are open. Hundreds of people headed to Connell Park Saturday afternoon for a dip in the pool. Kids splashed around, teens dove in at the deep end, and others found a spot in [...]

shorts.title: Annual Carnival on the Mountain brings locals out for fun
shorts.title_distilled: Annual Carnival on the Mountain brings locals out for fun.
shorts.description: JEFFERSON TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The carnival is in town for families in Lackawanna County's Jefferson Township. Rides, games, and delicious fair food are bringing people to the Carnival on the Mountain. Jefferson Township Volunteer Fire Company is hosting the carnival. Festivities have been going on since Tuesday, and people turned out on Saturday [...]
